pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21; using it with Java 21 results in compilation errors or runtime failures due to removed APIs and incompatibilities.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The build will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with the target runtime if the source/target version is not set to 21.
